content: Official MoonBit documentation confirms username-prefixed publication names, SemVer versions, registry consumption via moon add/deps, and credentials.json login. Current public documentation does not specify organization delegation, immutable-version/duplicate-publish recovery, token scope, revocation, or an API for namespace authority. Treat those as live preflight probes and fail closed; never infer namespace authority from GitHub ownership or a web page alone, and never blindly retry a publish whose remote result is uncertain.
